kjv: He hath made every thing beautiful in his time...
asv: He hath made everything beautiful in its time...

kjv: Be not rash with thy mouth, and let not thine heart be hasty to utter any thing before God...
asv: Be not rash with thy mouth, and let not thy heart be hasty to utter anything before God...

kjv: Better is the end of a thing than the beginning thereof: and the patient in spirit is better than the proud in spirit.
asv: Better is the end of a thing than the beginning thereof; and the patient in spirit is better than the proud in spirit.

kjv: Remember now thy Creator in the days of thy youth...
asv: Remember also thy Creator in the days of thy youth...

kjv: Fear God, and keep his commandments: for this is the whole duty of man.
asv: Fear God, and keep his commandments; for this is the whole duty of man.
